items.name_en: WALLET ON CHAIN LILY Series M82509 Uninspected Version#
items.name_cn:
WALLET ON CHAIN LILY Series M82509 Uninspected Version#
❒ Size: 20.7*10.2*3.5cm ❒
I'm absolutely in love with the lily woc series!
In terms of looks, the design is stunning!
I have to say, the designer really understands what girls want. The simple body paired with unique and exquisite chains gives the bag a unique vibe!
It looks exquisite but has a very high capacity.
Suitable for all seasons, it can be used as a clutch, crossbody, shoulder bag, or underarm bag. Multiple carrying styles!
Full of atmosphere, a must-have!

items.name_en: Weave the cicadas, sea breeze, and the whole of midsummer into the straw texture:
items.name_cn:
Weave the cicadas, sea breeze, and the whole of midsummer into the straw texture:
The straw bag sways with scattered light spots, holding orange soda, flower skirt hems, and even a spontaneous journey to mountains and seas, firmly holding the ritual of summer in your hand

specs.rawTitle:
Weave the cicadas, sea breeze, and the whole of midsummer into the straw texture:
The straw bag sways with scattered light spots, holding orange soda, flower skirt hems, and even a spontaneous journey to mountains and seas, firmly holding the ritual of summer in your hand

items.name_cn:
West Hollywood_Small
If you love vintage bags and have always wanted a unique, everyday style, this is the perfect choice! It has a great vintage feel and a cool vibe~
The bag has plenty of capacity. With a flap design and four compartments including a zipper, the outer layer holds a lot, making it perfect for commuting or going out.
Size: 24×15×10
Model: 738820
